meta.note: Site is JS-rendered; word counts from browser fetch via Claude-in-Chrome

records.title: Welcome to your Alumni community
records.excerpt: Welcome to your alumni community With over 500,000 alumni across the globe, you're part of a vibrant network. Reconnect, grow your career, and get involved in events. Explore volunteer and mentor opportunities, and discover initiatives that strengthen your bond with the University and fellow graduates.

records.title: Welcome new alumni
records.excerpt: Welcome new alumni and graduates Congratulations on joining this talented, diverse community who are creating a brighter future from every corner of the world. As a University of Melbourne graduate, your vibrant alumni community can continue to be a source of joy, connection and direction at every step.

records.title: Alumni support and resources
records.excerpt: Alumni support and resources Resources for professional growth and successThere is a wealth of information and resources available for you to tap into, and we're here to help you find what you need.

records.title: Alumni events – find and register
records.excerpt: Alumni events – find and register Find and register for alumni events Please note the calendar below shows events from our alumni events management system and may not include all events you're interested in attending.

records.title: Online journal subscriptions for alumni
records.excerpt: Online journal subscriptions for alumni Access thousands of online journals as an alumni benefit Free online journal access is available to all University of Melbourne alumni. This provides you with access to thousands of journals and databases across a range of subject areas.

records.title: Career support for alumni
records.excerpt: Career support for alumni Guiding your career at every stageWhether you're at the start of your professional journey or looking to level-up your career, the University of Melbourne provides an unrivalled set of resources to help you thrive in the working world.

records.title: Career tools for alumni
records.excerpt: Career tools for alumni Unlock the tools that move your career forwardWe have a range of career tools and resources available to help you achieve your professional goals – at every stage of your career.

records.title: Contact us | alumni
records.excerpt: Contact us at the University of Melbourne Have a question about your alumni benefits or just need to get in touch? We're here to help.

records.title: Alumni global community
records.excerpt: Alumni global community Stay connected wherever you are With over 500,000 alumni from 180 countries, our community spans the globe. Stay connected with us and other alumni in your area through chapters, national networks, discipline networks, and social media.

records.title: Find an alumni group
records.excerpt: Find an alumni group Find your alumni group Connect with alumni near you – or with others who share your professional or personal interests. Find your group and join through the portal below.

records.title: Stay connected as an alumni
records.excerpt: Stay connected as an alumni Connect, contribute and make your mark Whether it's reconnecting with your college friends, being inspired by stories from alumni who've made their mark, or celebrating at a local event, there's something for everyone in the alumni community.

records.title: Alumni news and stories
records.excerpt: Alumni news and stories Latest news, stories and updatesStay up to date on what's happening at the University of Melbourne and be inspired by news and stories from our global alumni community.

records.title: How cultural immersion is helping an international alum succeed
records.excerpt: How cultural immersion is helping an international alum succeed Thuy Tran's story is one of remarkable transformation, a testament to the power of cultural immersion and the value of international experience. Growing up in Vietnam, she harboured a dream to work and live abroad.

records.title: Sal Balharrie – an alumna on her own terms
records.excerpt: Sal Balharrie – an alumna on her own terms Sal Balharrie's career has been shaped by her own rules. Starting out as a graduate in finance, she pivoted into technology and then into a leadership role driving responsible AI at Telstra.

records.title: Meet the UniMelb graduate, Managing Director of Broadspectrum
records.excerpt: Meet the UniMelb graduate, Managing Director of Broadspectrum Ivan Chadwick has one of the most complex jobs in Australia: managing 6,500 people across some of Australia's most critical infrastructure projects. He has built a career that has taken him from UniMelb's Faculty of Engineering to the very top.

records.title: How a commerce alum became CMO of Flight Centre
records.excerpt: How a commerce alum became CMO of Flight Centre Rebecca Donaldson graduated with a Bachelor of Commerce and started her career at what may have seemed like an unlikely first job.

records.title: Profile: Dorothy Hill AC - Global Alumni Award winner
records.excerpt: Profile: Dorothy Hill AC - Global Alumni Award winner Dorothy Hill AC was a geologist who blazed a trail for women in science and higher education. She was the first woman to hold a personal chair at an Australian university.

records.title: Volunteering as an alumnus
records.excerpt: Volunteering as an alumnus Use your expertise to give back to the University community Each alumnus has a unique set of skills and experiences to offer. There are many ways you can use these to make a meaningful contribution to the University community.

records.title: Get involved as an alumnus
records.excerpt: Get involved as an alumnus Use your experience to support our communityAs a member of the University of Melbourne's alumni community, you have the power to make a real difference. Whether you're keen to mentor the next generation of graduates, share your expertise, or support our students financially.

records.title: Alumni benefits
records.excerpt: Alumni benefits Exclusive discounts and opportunities for our alumni community The University of Melbourne offers its alumni community a range of exclusive benefits.

records.title: Professional development benefits for alumni
records.excerpt: Professional development benefits for alumni Advance your career with exclusive alumni benefitsAlumni can access a range of resources and benefits for professional development.

records.title: Lifestyle benefits for alumni
records.excerpt: Lifestyle benefits for alumni Benefits to enrich your lifeAlumni enjoy access to a variety of special rates and benefits to help them get the most out of life in Melbourne – and beyond.

records.title: University access benefits for alumni
records.excerpt: University access benefits for alumni Keep connected to the University community Alumni enjoy special access to University facilities and services.

records.title: Library access for alumni
records.excerpt: Library access for alumni Stay up to date in your field with library access Alumni can access library services to keep them in touch with the latest research in their field.

records.title: Sports Centre membership for alumni
records.excerpt: Sports Centre membership for alumni Discounted gym and pool membership for alumni Stay active with a discounted membership to one of the University's two Sports Centres.

records.title: Keep your alumni email address
records.excerpt: Keep your alumni email address Keep your UniMelb email address for lifeAlumni can keep their University of Melbourne email address (yourname@alumni.unimelb.edu.au) for life.

records.title: Dining and accommodation benefits for alumni
records.excerpt: Dining and accommodation benefits for alumni Enjoy exclusive discounts on accommodation and dining across MelbourneAlumni enjoy exclusive rates at University-affiliated accommodation and dining venues.

records.title: Arts benefits for alumni
records.excerpt: Arts benefits for alumni Enrich your life with art alumni benefitsAlumni can enjoy cultural experiences across Melbourne and beyond.

records.title: Health benefits for alumni
records.excerpt: Health benefits for alumni Stay healthy with alumni health benefitsAlumni can access a range of health and wellbeing resources and discounts.

records.title: Financial benefits for alumni
records.excerpt: Financial benefits for alumni Financial benefits for University of Melbourne alumniAlumni can access a range of financial benefits and discounts.

records.title: Notable alumni achievements
records.excerpt: Notable alumni Impactful alumni that you might recogniseUniversity of Melbourne alumni are sought out by employers internationally as they are renowned for their talent and dedication.

records.title: Alumni chapters around the world
records.excerpt: Alumni chapters around the world Connect with alumni in your regionAlumni chapters are a way to connect with other University of Melbourne alumni in your local area.

records.title: UniMelb India Network
records.excerpt: UniMelb India Network Connect with alumni in IndiaThe UniMelb India network connects University of Melbourne alumni and friends with each other, and the University.

records.title: Alumni Council
records.excerpt: Alumni Council The voice of the alumni communityThe Alumni Council represents the interests of University of Melbourne alumni and provides advice on matters of strategic importance to the University.

records.title: Alumni awards
records.excerpt: Alumni awards Celebrating outstanding alumni achievementsThe University of Melbourne recognises the achievements of distinguished alumni through its annual Global Alumni Awards.

records.title: How an arts degree propelled alum Rob into fintech leadership
records.excerpt: How an arts degree propelled alum Rob into fintech leadership For some, Rob Humann's journey from arts student to CEO of Credible might be unexpected.

records.title: How a science grad became leader in community health
records.excerpt: How a science grad became leader in community health Stephanie Beauchamp runs Tanderrum, a healthcare company serving remote Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander communities.

records.title: From medicine to marketing: Vanessa Veness
records.excerpt: From medicine to marketing: Vanessa Veness Vanessa Veness is a University of Melbourne medicine and public health graduate who built a career in medical communications.

records.title: How an education alum is changing lives
records.excerpt: How an education alum is changing lives Debbie Shilton is a University of Melbourne education graduate who has spent her career working on cardiovascular health policy.

records.title: Engineering alum Ben Haylock: from AI to ethics
records.excerpt: Engineering alum Ben Haylock: from AI to ethics Ben Haylock is a University of Melbourne engineering graduate who is now working on AI ethics.

records.title: India Alumni Network
records.excerpt: India Alumni Network India Alumni Network. About The University launched the India Alumni Network in 2023. Our Network volunteers act as valuable points of contact within key regions for the University.

records.title: Indonesia Alumni Association
records.excerpt: Indonesia Alumni Association Indonesia Alumni Association. About The University of Melbourne Indonesia Alumni Association aims to provide all alumni, especially those who are in the greater Jakarta area.

records.title: How a law alum is fighting for social justice
records.excerpt: How a law alum is fighting for social justice Emiliano Mellino is a University of Melbourne law graduate who is working on social justice issues.

records.title: Life of service to international students
records.excerpt: Life of service to international students Thao Le has dedicated her career to supporting international students at the University of Melbourne.

records.title: How a UniMelb alum made a career pivot into fintech
records.excerpt: How a UniMelb alum made a career pivot into fintech Tim Dean is a University of Melbourne graduate who pivoted from academia to fintech.

records.title: Architecture alum James Cleary: designing the future
records.excerpt: Architecture alum James Cleary: designing the future James Cleary is a University of Melbourne architecture graduate who is now working on sustainable design.

records.title: Commerce alum Dan Krasnostein: from law to tech
records.excerpt: Commerce alum Dan Krasnostein: from law to tech Dan Krasnostein is a University of Melbourne commerce graduate who built a career in technology.

records.title: Smiles all around at the Melbourne Dental School milestone reunion
records.excerpt: Smiles all around at the Melbourne Dental School milestone reunion The Melbourne Dental School held a milestone reunion for graduates from the 1970s and 1980s.
